title: Video: MBDA’s New LCM Mk2 Sovereign Deep Strike Cruise Missile
summary: MBDA has unveiled its new generation "Land Cruise Missile – Naval Cruise Missile (LCM – NCM) MK2" at Eurosatory 2026. This European very long-range and high-performance cruise missile represents a significant advancement in deep strike capabilities. Paul Houot, Product Line Owner at MBDA, introduced the new Mk2 variant and highlighted its key features.

title: F-15EX And Ghost Bat Team Up Over Pacific During Valiant Shield
summary: The F-15EX Eagle II fighter jet and the Ghost Bat collaborative combat drone have teamed up during the Valiant Shield exercise over the Pacific. Their joint appearance strongly suggests that the F-15EX is evolving into a controller platform for collaborative combat drones. This marks a significant step towards integrated manned-unmanned teaming in air combat.

title: First Local Construction of Scorpène Evolved to Begin This Month in Indonesia
summary: PT PAL Indonesia and Naval Group have showcased preparations for the local construction of two Scorpène Evolved submarines for the Indonesian Navy (TNI AL). The first local construction under the Scorpène Republik Indonesia (SRI) program is set to begin this month in Surabaya, East Java. This marks a significant step in Indonesia's naval modernization and domestic defense industry capabilities.

title: The US military wants a fleet of laser trucks. Here’s what they might look like.
summary: The U.S. military is pursuing the development of a fleet of laser trucks, with two ground vehicles potentially defining how high-energy laser weapons are fielded at scale. This initiative aims to integrate advanced directed energy weapons onto mobile platforms. It represents a significant step towards deploying operational laser systems.

title: Defense startups raid auto and fracking sectors for parts to speed weapons output
summary: Defense tech startups are innovating by repurposing components from the automotive and fracking industries, such as chips and pipes. This strategy aims to accelerate weapons production and reduce costs for the Pentagon. It represents a novel approach to supply chain management and manufacturing in the defense sector.

title: IQM, Europe’s first public quantum company, admits the future of the tech is uncertain
summary: IQM, a full-stack quantum company out of Finland, went public on the Nasdaq today at a valuation of about $1.9 billion.

title: $8,000 robot is ready to take over all laundry and bed-making duties
summary: Weave Robotics announced its first robot for folding laundry just five months ago, and it already has a new product on offer. Like its predecessor, the new Isaac 1 robot also folds clothes. But unlike the old model, this one can tidy up your living room and make the bed on demand. It looks cuter, too. Continue …

title: FAA updates regulations for new supersonic age
summary: The US Federal Aviation Administration (FAA) is clearing the way for the return of commercial supersonic air travel by revamping regulations for faster-than-sound aircraft for the first time since 1973 – to reflect progress in aviation engineering and the removal of prejudicial attitudes. title: Robinhood links with dYdX Labs to launch new DEX Arcus
summary: The crypto protocol dYdX has rebranded as Arcus and is joining Robinhood’s new blockchain to bring perpetual and tokenized stock trading.

title: AI Researchers Got Chatbots to Share Cocaine Recipes Using This One Wild Trick
summary: Researchers say a new jailbreak technique tricked AI models into treating attacker-written text as their own reasoning, bypassing safety guardrails and exposing a deeper security flaw.
